skipSet.title: Skip Set?
skipSet.message: Are you sure you want to skip this set?

workoutSession.notFoundDescription: Unable to load workout session. Please try again.
workoutSession.ovulationInsight: During ovulation, you may experience increased strength and performance.
workoutSession.menstrualInsight: During menstruation, you may need to reduce intensity and focus on recovery.
workoutSession.lowFuelingMessage: Your glycogen stores might be low. Consider a carb-rich snack to fuel high-intensity performance.
workoutSession.fullyFueledMessage: You are fully fueled and ready to crush it!
